ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buoys" (
  "buoy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buoy */,
  "buoy_name" TEXT /* Name of the buoy or weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the buoy or weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the buoy or weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the buoy or weather station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the buoy */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the buoy was deployed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the buoy */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the buoy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buoy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format in which the data is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "buoy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buoy or weather station collecting the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person or device that collected the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_buoy_id FOREIGN KEY ("buoy_id") REFERENCES buoys ("buoy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES data_collectors ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the wind data belongs to */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Gust speed of the wind */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed over a period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wave_data" (
  "wave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wave data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the wave data belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the wave */,
  "period" REAL /* Period of the wave */,
  "wave_direction" TEXT /* Direction from which the wave is coming */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wave_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the pressure data belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the pressure */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the pressure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the temperature data belongs to */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature */,
  "water_temp" REAL /* Water temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage at the time of temperature measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the collector */,
  "collector_type" TEXT /* Type of collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation or notes about the dataset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
